theScene: While peacefully walking through the forest, you can't help but feel you're being watched... apart from the Blue Slime attempting to hide in the bush behind you.
Walk forward without a care in the world.
You carefully step over the wire and continue on your way, only to hear some elves yelling at you not long after.
You turn, ready to fight, only to watch as two elves, who presumably set the trap in the first place, trigger the tripwire and get hoisted into the air.
They seem rather embarrassed by being caught by their own trap. They stare at you awkwardly as they gently dangle in the air.
Uhm... Y-You wouldn't happen to be willing to get us down from here, would you? M-Merciful hero?
We know there's a slime hiding in that bush over there, please don't leave us to its whims...
You decide to continue on your way, ignoring the elves' pleas. They tried to catch you in that trap, after all. They deserve a taste of their own medicine, don't they?
As you walk away, you are pretty sure you hear the sound of gelatinous noises behind you, the lewd moans of the elves echoing through the forest...
